title: Belfast

infobox.value: [1 April 2015](/wiki/Reform_of_local_government_in_Northern_Ireland "Reform of local government in Northern Ireland")

infobox.key: • [Control](/wiki/Political_make-up_of_local_councils_in_the_United_Kingdom#Northern_Ireland "Political make-up of local councils in the United Kingdom")

infobox.value: 4 MPs   * [Belfast North](/wiki/Belfast_North_(UK_Parliament_constituency) "Belfast North (UK Parliament constituency)") ([SF](/wiki/Sinn_F%C3%A9in "Sinn Féin")) * [Belfast South and Mid Down](/wiki/Belfast_South_and_Mid_Down "Belfast South and Mid Down") ([SDLP](/wiki/Social_Democratic_and_Labour_Party "Social Democratic and Labour Party")) * [Belfast East](/wiki/Belfast_East_(UK_Parliament_constituency) "Belfast East (UK Parliament constituency)") ([DUP](/wiki/Democratic_Unionist_Party "Democratic Unionist Party")) * [Belfast West](/wiki/Belfast_West_(UK_Parliament_constituency) "Belfast West (UK Parliament constituency)") ([SF](/wiki/Sinn_F%C3%A9in "Sinn Féin"))

20 MLAs   * [Belfast North](/wiki/Belfast_North_(Assembly_constituency) "Belfast North (Assembly constituency)") * [Belfast South](/wiki/Belfast_South_(Assembly_constituency) "Belfast South (Assembly constituency)") * [Belfast East](/wiki/Belfast_East_(Assembly_constituency) "Belfast East (Assembly constituency)") * [Belfast West](/wiki/Belfast_West_(Assembly_constituency) "Belfast West (Assembly constituency)")

([/ˈbɛlfæst/](/wiki/Help:IPA/English "Help:IPA/English") [ⓘ](/wiki/File:LL-Q1860_(eng)-Vealhurl-Belfast.wav "File:LL-Q1860 (eng)-Vealhurl-Belfast.wav"), [*BEL-fast*](/wiki/Help:Pronunciation_respelling_key "Help:Pronunciation respelling key"), [/-fɑːst/](/wiki/Help:IPA/English "Help:IPA/English"), [*-⁠fahst*](/wiki/Help:Pronunciation_respelling_key "Help:Pronunciation respelling key");[[a]](#cite_note-3) from [Irish](/wiki/Irish_language "Irish language"): *Béal Feirste* [[bʲeːlˠ ˈfʲɛɾˠ(ə)ʃtʲə]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Irish "Help:IPA/Irish")[ⓘ](/wiki/File:Uladh_-_Aontroim_-_B%C3%A9al_Feirste.wav "File:Uladh - Aontroim - Béal Feirste.wav"))[[3]](#cite_note-4)[[4]](#cite_note-Logainm-5) is the capital city and principal port of [Northern Ireland](/wiki/Northern_Ireland "Northern Ireland"), standing on the banks of the [River Lagan](/wiki/River_Lagan "River Lagan") and connected to the open sea through [Belfast Lough](/wiki/Belfast_Lough "Belfast Lough") and the [North Channel](/wiki/North_Channel_(Great_Britain_and_Ireland) "North Channel (Great Britain and Ireland)"). It is the largest city in Northern Ireland and the second-largest city in [Ireland](/wiki/Ireland "Ireland") (after [Dublin](/wiki/Dublin "Dublin")), with an estimated population of 352,390 in 2024,[[2]](#cite_note-popstats-2) and [its metropolitan area](/wiki/Belfast_metropolitan_area "Belfast metropolitan area") has a population of 671,559.[[5]](#cite_note-:17-6)
